overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Mirage showing the protagonist Basim navigating through a historical Islamic city (Baghdad) with ornate sandstone architecture, palm trees, and bustling NPC pedestrians. The character moves through various urban environments including colonnaded streets, covered walkways with fabric awnings, and open courtyards with domed pavilions.

scene_state.functional_zone: residential street with ornate manor houses

events.description: character turns left from manor entrance onto main street
approaching and passing through large stone archway

agents.ego_description: walking briskly past the ornate sandstone manor with columns and vines, turning left onto the palm-lined street

notable_agents.action: woman in green robes walking in the same direction ahead

entered.detail: large residential building with tall columns, wooden doors, and climbing vines
tall date palms lining the street casting shadows on the ground
large decorative archway marking the entrance to the next district
carved wooden privacy screen on the building facade

segments.scene_description: The segment opens beside an ornate sandstone manor with classical columns and climbing vines. The character turns left onto a sun-drenched street lined with palm trees, walking toward a large decorative stone archway in the distance. Sparse pedestrians in period clothing walk along the cobblestone path.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered alleyway with fabric awnings and staircases

events.description: passing through archway into shaded alley with overhead fabric canopies

agents.ego_description: walking through the covered alley and climbing the stone stairs, following a companion in dark robes

notable_agents.action: companion in dark hooded robes walking ahead and gesturing

entered.detail: green fabric awning providing shade over the alley
wide stone staircase leading to upper level of the building
wall with blue decorative tiles and water feature
orange fabric awning further down the alley

segments.scene_description: Passing through the archway, the scene transitions to a narrower, shaded alleyway covered by green and orange fabric canopies. The character follows a companion up a wide stone staircase, passing decorative fountain walls with blue tiles and potted red flowers. The lighting becomes softer and more diffused under the awnings.

scene_state.functional_zone: open courtyard with domed pavilion and colonnaded walkway

events.description: descending from upper walkway back to street level
entering open courtyard with central domed structure

agents.ego_description: descending stairs and walking through a colonnaded walkway into a sunlit courtyard with a central dome

notable_agents.action: man in brown tunic walking alongside the player character

entered.detail: wooden cart loaded with hay bales parked against the wall
walkway lined with tall sandstone columns and arches
octagonal pavilion with a central dome and arched openings
stone fountain basin in the middle of the courtyard

segments.scene_description: The character descends from the upper level to a street where a hay cart sits parked. Moving through a grand colonnaded walkway with tall stone columns, the scene opens into a bright courtyard featuring a central domed pavilion and a stone fountain. The crowd density increases with various NPCs walking through the plaza.

scene_state.functional_zone: market courtyard with flower stalls and guard patrols

events.description: encountering group of guards in red uniforms patrolling the area
passing large pile of pink flowers that temporarily blocks view of the street

agents.ego_description: navigating through the busy courtyard past a flower merchant and a patrol of guards in red uniforms

notable_agents.action: group of three guards in red tunics and turbans walking through the courtyard

entered.detail: market stall with large piles of pink and purple flowers
low stone seating along the building wall

segments.scene_description: Exiting the domed pavilion area, the character enters a market section with a prominent flower stall displaying pink blooms on the left. A patrol of guards in distinctive red uniforms walks through the center of the courtyard. The character continues past stone benches and hanging fabric awnings toward a narrower street.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow market street leading to city gate

events.description: approaching final large stone archway marking district boundary

agents.ego_description: walking down the final stretch of street toward a large archway, passing market stalls and ivy-covered walls

entered.detail: large decorative archway with intricate carvings marking the street end
sandstone walls covered in green climbing vines
wooden market stall with fabric roofing

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the character walking down a narrower street lined with ivy-covered walls and small market stalls. The street leads toward a final large stone archway in the distance. The crowd thins out as the character approaches the district boundary, with warm sunlight illuminating the sandstone architecture.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a bright, open street into a shaded, intimate urban alleyway. It begins beside an ornate sandstone manor with classical columns and climbing vines, moving left onto a sun-drenched cobblestone path lined with palm trees and sparse pedestrians. As the camera advances toward a large decorative stone archway, the scene transitions from the open sunlight into a narrower passage sheltered by green and orange fabric canopies. The lighting becomes softer and more diffused as the character follows a companion up a wide stone staircase, passing blue-tiled fountain walls and potted red flowers.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a grand, open plaza through a bustling marketplace and into a quiet, narrow residential street. It begins as the character descends to a street with a parked hay cart, moving through a colonnaded walkway that opens into a bright courtyard featuring a central domed pavilion and a stone fountain. As the character exits the pavilion area, the scene shifts into a market section characterized by pink flower stalls and red-uniformed guards patrolling beneath hanging fabric awnings. The environment then narrows into a street lined with ivy-covered walls and small stalls, where the crowd thins out. Finally, the camera follows the character toward a large stone archway in the distance, with warm sunlight illuminating the sandstone architecture of the district boundary.
